parsed_review.summary: CP00-236 passes independent read-only review with one non-blocking P3 informational finding; no P0/P1/P2 issues, and pack/goal closeout are not blocked by this review.

findings.title: M02 type/shape tail rows rely on generic descriptor checks only; row-specific semantic guards are asserted against the M03 copies
findings.details: validateSearchCoreCp236ModelStorageSliceDescriptor applies its row-specific semantic assertions (validation_helper.validation_error_detail_included, fixture_model.real_client_data_loaded, model_unit_test.executes_unit_test_runtime_paths, invalid_reference_test.expected_outcome, ownership_drift_test.ownership_drift_detected, hermes_model_summary.emits_hermes_runtime_receipt, claude_model_review_prompt.claude_final_approval_claimed, documentation_entry, index_export_check) only to sections['RP07.P01.M03'] (lines 311-320) and tenant/matter checks to sections['RP07.P01.M04'] (lines 321-323). The RP07.P01.M02 section in this pack also contains validation_helper, fixture_model, model_unit_test, invalid_reference_test, ownership_drift_test, hermes_model_summary, and claude_model_review_prompt rows (required_section_rows['RP07.P01.M02'] in registry.js), but those M02 copies receive only the generic per-row loop checks (descriptor_only, runtime_execution=false, customer_safe_errors_only, raw_payload_included=false), not the dedicated semantic assertions.
findings.recommendation: Optionally extend the descriptor validator to assert the same semantic guard fields on the M02 tail rows (or iterate the shared row-key guard map across every section that contains the key) so future edits that make the case-set builder section-aware cannot silently diverge M02 from M03.
findings.post_review_disposition: Informational / non-blocking; accept as-is for CP00-236. No boundary impact: every row in every section (M02/M03/M04) is already checked for descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, customer_safe_errors_only=true, and raw_payload_included=false, and the per-key semantic fields originate from the single frozen SEARCH_CORE_CP236_ROW_EXTRAS constant applied uniformly by key in service.js, so M02 and M03 rows sharing a key are identical by construction. This does not block pack or goal closeout.
